sizing_rule.note: Fractional f approach: Trade 1 unit per $400 equity (1 unit / 4 = 0.25 optimal f). FAHPR and FSD formulas indicate fractional Kelly applied to optimal f calculations for reduced variance.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 unit for every 4 units of account equity, which represents a fractional f approach to position sizing based on optimal f calculations.
